chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P. No. D- 703 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.03.2022. Mr. Safdar Ali G.Ghouri, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G Sindh. ----------- It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioners that a letter containing recommendation for posting of the petitioners in District of their domicile has already been written by A.I.G Establishment for Inspector General of Police Sindh to Additional Chief Secretary, Home Department, Government of Sindh (copy whereof is brought on record). By stating so, for the time being, under instructions, he does not press the instant constitutional petition; it is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Syd Ashfaq/-.
